label: Schengen short-stay rule
value: 90 days within any rolling 180-day period, visa-free for many nationalities (tourism only, no work)
notes: EU's ETIAS travel authorization is being rolled out — check if it now applies to your nationality.

label: US naturalization residency requirement
value: ~5 years as a permanent resident (3 if married to a US citizen)
notes: Plus physical-presence, good-moral-character, and civics/English test requirements.

label: Japan permanent residence typical requirement
value: ~10 years of residence (fewer via the Highly Skilled Professional points fast-track)
notes: Highly Skilled Professionals can qualify in as little as 1-3 years by points.
